001/**
002 * ********************** PROJECT RON ************************

008 * ***********************************************************
009 */
010package com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.vision;
011
012import static edu.wpi.first.units.Units.*;
013import com.stuypulse.robot.Robot;
014import com.stuypulse.robot.commands.vision.SetPipeline;
015import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Cameras;
016import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings;
017import com.stuypulse.robot.constants.Settings.EnabledSubsystems;
018import com.stuypulse.robot.subsystems.swerve.CommandSwerveDrivetrain;
019import com.stuypulse.robot.util.vision.LimelightHelpers;
020import com.stuypulse.robot.util.vision.LimelightHelpers.IMUData;
021import com.stuypulse.robot.util.vision.LimelightHelpers.PoseEstimate;
022import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose2d;
023import edu.wpi.first.math.geometry.Pose3d;
024import edu.wpi.first.networktables.BooleanSubscriber;
025import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj.smartdashboard.SmartDashboard;
026import edu.wpi.first.wpilibj2.command.SubsystemBase;
027import dev.doglog.DogLog;
028
029public class LimelightVision extends SubsystemBase {
030
031    private static final LimelightVision instance;
032
033    static {
034        instance = new LimelightVision();
035        SmartDashboard.putData("Vision/Set Cloudy Pipeline", new SetPipeline(0));
036        SmartDashboard.putData("Vision/Set Sunny Pipeline", new SetPipeline(1));
037    }
038
039    public static LimelightVision getInstance() {
040        return instance;
041    }
042
043    private String[] names;
044
045    private BooleanSubscriber[] camerasEnabled;
046
047    private MegaTagMode megaTagMode;
048
049    public enum MegaTagMode {
050
051        MEGATAG1, MEGATAG2
052    }
053
054    public LimelightVision() {
055        names = new String[Cameras.LimelightCameras.length];
056        for (int i = 0; i < Cameras.LimelightCameras.length; i++) {
057            names[i] = Cameras.LimelightCameras[i].name();
058            Pose3d robotRelativePose = Cameras.LimelightCameras[i].location();
059            LimelightHelpers.setCameraPose_RobotSpace(names[i], robotRelativePose.getX(), robotRelativePose.getY(), robotRelativePose.getZ(), robotRelativePose.getRotation().getMeasureX().in(Degrees), robotRelativePose.getRotation().getMeasureY().in(Degrees), robotRelativePose.getRotation().getMeasureZ().in(Degrees));
060        }
061        camerasEnabled = new BooleanSubscriber[Cameras.LimelightCameras.length];
062        for (int i = 0; i < camerasEnabled.length; i++) {
063            camerasEnabled[i] = DogLog.tunable("Vision/" + names[i] + " Is Enabled", true);
064            setIMUMode(1);
065            DogLog.log("Vision/" + names[i] + " Has Data", false);
066        }
067        setMegaTagMode(MegaTagMode.MEGATAG1);
068    }
069
070    public void setTagWhitelist(int[] ids) {
071        for (String name : names) {
072            LimelightHelpers.SetFiducialIDFiltersOverride(name, ids);
073        }
074    }
075
076    public void enable() {
077        EnabledSubsystems.VISION.getTopic().publish().set(true);
078    }
079
080    public void disable() {
081        EnabledSubsystems.VISION.getTopic().publish().set(false);
082    }
083
084    public void setCameraEnabled(String name, boolean enabled) {
085        for (int i = 0; i < names.length; i++) {
086            if (names[i].equals(name)) {
087                camerasEnabled[i].getTopic().publish().set(enabled);
088            }
089        }
090    }
091
092    public void setMegaTagMode(MegaTagMode mode) {
093        this.megaTagMode = mode;
094    }
095
096    public void setIMUMode(int mode) {
097        for (String name : names) {
098            LimelightHelpers.SetIMUMode(name, mode);
099        }
100    }
101
102    public void setPipeline(int pipeline) {
103        for (String name : names) {
104            LimelightHelpers.setPipelineIndex(name, pipeline);
105        }
106    }
107
108    /**
109     * Allows you to set the convergence speed of the internal LL IMU and robot gyro.
110     *
111     * @param assistValue, an double that sets the correction speed of the complementary filter for the IMU. IMU Mode 4
112     * uses the fusing of the internal IMU (1khz) with the external gyro reading as well. Higher values ranging towards 1
113     * indicate a faster convergence of internal IMU to the robot IMU mode. Defaults to 0.001.
114     */
115    public void setIMUAssistValue(double assistValue) {
116        for (String name : names) {
117            LimelightHelpers.SetIMUAssistAlpha(name, assistValue);
118        }
119    }
120
121    public IMUData[] getIMUData() {
122        IMUData[] data = new IMUData[Cameras.LimelightCameras.length];
123        for (int i = 0; i < Cameras.LimelightCameras.length; i++) {
124            data[i] = LimelightHelpers.getIMUData(Cameras.LimelightCameras[i].name());
125        }
126        return data;
127    }
128
129    @Override
130    public void periodic() {
131        if (!EnabledSubsystems.VISION.get()) {
132            return;
133        }
134        for (int i = 0; i < names.length; i++) {
135            if (!camerasEnabled[i].get()) {
136                DogLog.log("Vision/" + names[i] + " Has Data", false);
137                continue;
138            }
139            String limelightName = names[i];
140            // Seed robot heading (used by MT2)
141            LimelightHelpers.SetRobotOrientation(limelightName, (CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().getPose().getRotation().getDegrees() + (Robot.isBlue() ? 0 : 180)) % 360, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0);
142            PoseEstimate poseEstimate;
143            // MegaTag switching
144            if (megaTagMode == MegaTagMode.MEGATAG1) {
145                poseEstimate = Robot.isBlue() ? LimelightHelpers.getBotPoseEstimate_wpiBlue(limelightName) : LimelightHelpers.getBotPoseEstimate_wpiRed(limelightName);
146            } else {
147                poseEstimate = Robot.isBlue() ? LimelightHelpers.getBotPoseEstimate_wpiBlue_MegaTag2(limelightName) : LimelightHelpers.getBotPoseEstimate_wpiRed_MegaTag2(limelightName);
148            }
149            boolean notNull = false;
150            boolean withinAngularVelocityTolerance = false;
151            boolean withinInvalidPositionTolerance = false;
152            // Adding to pose estimator
153            if (poseEstimate != null && poseEstimate.tagCount > 0) {
154                notNull = true;
155                if (poseEstimate.pose.equals(Settings.Vision.INVALID_POSITION)) {
156                    withinInvalidPositionTolerance = false;
157                }
158                if (CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().getChassisSpeeds().omegaRadiansPerSecond < Settings.Vision.MAX_ANGULAR_VELOCITY_RAD_SEC) {
159                    withinAngularVelocityTolerance = true;
160                }
161                Boolean isValidPose = notNull && withinAngularVelocityTolerance && withinInvalidPositionTolerance;
162                DogLog.log("Vision/isValidPose", isValidPose);
163                DogLog.log("Vision/isWithinAngularVel", withinAngularVelocityTolerance);
164                DogLog.log("Vision/isWithinPos", withinInvalidPositionTolerance);
165                Pose2d robotPose = poseEstimate.pose;
166                double timestamp = poseEstimate.timestampSeconds;
167                if (megaTagMode == MegaTagMode.MEGATAG1 && isValidPose) {
168                    CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().addVisionMeasurement(robotPose, timestamp, Settings.Vision.MT1_STDEVS);
169                } else if (megaTagMode == MegaTagMode.MEGATAG2 && isValidPose) {
170                    CommandSwerveDrivetrain.getInstance().addVisionMeasurement(robotPose, timestamp, Settings.Vision.MT2_STDEVS);
171                }
172                DogLog.log("Vision/Pose X Component", robotPose.getX());
173                DogLog.log("Vision/Pose Y Component", robotPose.getY());
174                DogLog.log("Vision/Pose Theta (Degrees)", robotPose.getRotation().getDegrees());
175                DogLog.log("Vision/" + names[i] + " Has Data", true);
176                DogLog.log("Vision/MegaTag Mode", megaTagMode.toString());
177                // this yaw is seems to be the robot yaw passed into the LL
178                DogLog.forceNt.log("Vision/Pipeline", LimelightHelpers.getCurrentPipelineIndex(limelightName));
179                DogLog.log("Vision/Limelight Robot Yaw", LimelightHelpers.getIMUData(limelightName).robotYaw);
180                // this is just the yaw of the internal imu
181                DogLog.log("Vision/Limelight Yaw", LimelightHelpers.getIMUData(limelightName).Yaw);
182                DogLog.log("Vision/Has at least 2 tags", poseEstimate.tagCount >= 2);
183            }
184        }
185    }
186}
